ops.body: Done in 4cb5b8cd (pushed to main). One dated Keep-a-Changelog section per tag v0.6.0-v0.14.1 reconstructed from git log vX..vY; all 38 cited changes verified with git merge-base --is-ancestor (in-tag AND not-in-prev). Beyond filed scope, verified and fixed two adjacent drifts: the missing [0.15.1] section, and the misattributed [0.15.0] section (it documented the ccn alias and .notes symlink, which shipped in v0.7.8/v0.8.0; 0.15.0 now documents the real attachments/LFS release). Footer links completed for 0.6.0-0.16.0, [Unreleased] base moved v0.5.0 -> v0.16.0. slop-cop density matches the pre-existing sections.
